text: Join us as we dive into an exciting experiment with Google Stitch's AI design tools.
The article covers the redesign of a personal blog using Google Stitch,
emphasizing techniques like detailed prompts and the groundbreaking ID8 mode.
It reveals insights into AI-generated designs, the challenges of maintaining consistency,
and how tools like Stitch are transforming web design.
While there are some limitations, the ID8 mode shines as a game-changer,
providing creative ideas and a comprehensive design process.
Visit the full article for an in-depth look at this AI design adventure.
